signals.headline: Polymarket Study Reveals $143M Profits by 'Informed' Traders Since 2024 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Polymarket Study Reveals $143M Profits by 'Informed' Traders Since 2024 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
A new Columbia Law School and University of Haifa study, published this month, analyzed over 210,000 suspicious Polymarket trades from 2024-2026, estimating $143 million netted by accounts flagged as "informed" on X and Discord—likely sparking trader discussions on insider activity and regulation[1].
